changelog:
• Anti-Cheat Disconnect - Pemain yang kabur otomatis dieliminasi & lawan menang instan
• Smart Room ID - Host otomatis buat kode 4 digit acak
• Deep Link & Invitations - Share link undangan langsung masuk room
• Web-Play Support - Main langsung di browser tanpa install via play subdomain
• Hybrid Storage - Sinkronisasi data aman di Android, Windows, Linux, dan Web
• Real-time Identity - Profil & Leaderboard tersinkron otomatis setiap beres main
